title: salix × punctata
intro: Salix × punctata, also known as the prickly willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of pain and inflammation, due to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × punctata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe arthritis symptoms. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
